2259580.name: XANNIBAN
2259580.description:
EVIL HAS BEEN UNLEASHED.

YOUR MISSION:

In XANNIBAN, take the role of ‘Trespasser’ - a squad member tasked with locating the founder of a rogue technology corporation. It's only when you step foot into the bowels of XANNI-CORP that you realize something sinister has taken ahold of the premises.

Dash from room-to-room In this original point & click action horror game and lure autonomous machines into containment using various tools at your disposal.

Within each level's sector, you'll need to lure belligerent androids known as 'Guardians' and seal them away within dedicated containment rooms. Use flares, environmental props and parrying to bring them closer to containment.

Use your wits against AI that examines your moves closely. Parrying, luring and containing threats are the core aspects that you’ll need to master in order to survive.

Players will need to make full use of their arsenal of tools.  Use your flare-gun to distract enemies and wield your caliper to break through hidden passageways & block enemy attacks, with more equipment to find beneath.

Each tool serves a distinct purpose in the gameplay loop of XANNIBAN. Push back harder against your foes by constructing equipment upgrades, using the resources you find beneath.

FEATURES:

  • CAMPAIGN: Experience a vast and expansive campaign taking place in overgrown caverns, storage facilities, high-tech installations, and mysterious shrines. Scavenge pieces of abandoned machinery to assemble a sentry and use it to track down your elusive target. 

  • STORY: Learn about the dark world of XANNIBAN by unlocking character, environment & equipment descriptions as you make progress throughout the game.

  • CONTROLLER SUPPORT: XANNIBAN on launch will be tuned to have convenient controls on both KB+M and gamepad, from menus to gameplay.
2259580.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
